meta.name: arktaint-harmony-framework-rules
meta.description: Framework-level source/sink/transfer rules for HarmonyOS threat-oriented coverage (T1-T7).

sources.description: Exact probe signature for router.getParams() (Tier A).
Treat router.getParams() return value as untrusted page input.
Fallback: method-level getParams source with router class scope.
Treat onCreate(want, ...) first argument as external input for Ability/Stage/Extension entry.
Treat onNewWant(want) argument as external input.
Treat backup restore payload as untrusted lifecycle input.
Text input callback parameter for onChange.
Text input callback parameter for onInput.
Text input callback parameter for onSubmit.
requestAsync callback first parameter as response source.
Http.request() promise result as network response source.
windowStage.loadContent(page, callback) callback first parameter (err) as framework callback source.
windowStage.loadContent(page, callback) callback second parameter (data) as framework callback source.
WebView onMessage callback payload as untrusted source.
Preference read value as source in leak/persistence scenarios.
Preference get() return value as source in leak/persistence scenarios.
GlobalContext.getObject() return value as source when globally persisted data is read back.
File read result as untrusted source.
File readSync result as untrusted source.
Distributed KV get() return value as source.
V1 stage seeding: mark external context reads inside AbilityStage.onCreate as source.
Optional privacy source: system pasteboard read result.
Optional privacy source: pasteboard getData() result.
Optional privacy source: contacts query result.
Observation-only: commonEvent subscribe callback payload (cross-process boundary, disabled by default).
SIM account info with phone number
Bluetooth SPP serial port data receive

sinks.description: Observation-only: commonEvent publish payload sink (cross-process boundary, disabled by default).
Register JS bridge object to WebView
App event logging with sensitive data

transfers.description: GlobalContext.setObject(key, value): value taints context base object.
GlobalContext.getObject(key): context base taints read result.
Exact probe signature for stringify (Tier A).
Exact probe signature for parse (Tier A).
JSON.stringify(x): x taints serialized string.
JSON.parse(str): input string taints parsed value.
Fallback: JSON.stringify(x) via signature match.
Fallback: JSON.parse(str) via signature match.
String.concat(arg): argument taints concatenation result.
String.concat(arg): receiver string taints concatenation result.
Pure String transforms conservatively taint their result from the receiver string.
String.at(index): receiver string taints indexed result.
String.replace(search, replacement): receiver string taints replacement result.
String.replace(search, replacement): replacement text taints replacement result.
String.replaceAll(search, replacement): receiver string taints replacement result.
String.replaceAll(search, replacement): replacement text taints replacement result.
String.match(regexp): receiver string taints match result.
String.matchAll(regexp): receiver string taints match iterator result.
String.raw(template, ...subs): template taints raw string result.
String.raw(template, ...subs): first substitution taints raw string result.
String pad transforms conservatively taint their result from the receiver string.
String pad transforms propagate taint from the pad string to the result.
String.split(sep): conservatively taint resulting array from the receiver string.
Array.join(sep): array elements conservatively taint joined string result.
Object.assign(target, source): source taints target object.
Object.assign(target, source): source taints returned object.
Object.keys(obj): object key content taints returned key array.
Object.values(obj): object value content taints returned value array.
Object.entries(obj): object value content taints returned entry array.
Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(obj): object value content taints descriptor result.
Reflect.set(target, key, value): value taints target object.
WeakRef.deref(): wrapped object taint flows to dereferenced result.
encodeURI(x): input string taints encoded result.
decodeURI(x): input string taints decoded result.
encodeURIComponent(x): input string taints encoded component result.
decodeURIComponent(x): input string taints decoded component result.
escape(x): input string taints escaped result.
unescape(x): input string taints unescaped result.
atob(encoded): Base64-encoded string taints decoded result.
btoa(data): input string taints Base64-encoded result.
Array.sort(): sorted array (same reference) preserves taint.
Array.reverse(): reversed array (same reference) preserves taint.
Array.fill(value): fill value taints array base.
Array.fill(value): returns same array reference.
Array.copyWithin(): returns same array reference preserving taint.
Object.freeze(obj): returns same frozen object.
Object.seal(obj): returns same sealed object.
Object.getOwnPropertyNames(obj): object property names taint result array.
Object.preventExtensions(obj): returns same object reference.
Object.create(proto): prototype properties accessible on created object.
Object.create(proto, descriptors): descriptor values taint created object.
Object.defineProperty(obj, prop, descriptor): descriptor value taints target.
Object.defineProperty(obj, prop, descriptor): returns same object.
Object.defineProperties(obj, props): descriptor values taint target.
Object.defineProperties(obj, props): returns same object.
RegExp.exec(str): matched string content taints result array.
Reflect.ownKeys(obj): object property keys taint result array.
Reflect.apply(target, thisArg, args): args array taints function result.
Reflect.construct(target, args): args array taints constructed object.
Reflect.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(obj, prop): object content taints descriptor.
TypedArray.subarray(): buffer view preserves taint.
TypedArray.set(source): source array content taints target typed array.
Http.request(url, data): request payload may influence response result.
axios.get(url): url taints response result.
axios.post(url, data): body taints response result.
Preferences.put(key, value): value taints preferences base.
Preferences.putSync(key, value): value taints preferences base.
Preferences.get(key): preferences base taints read result.
Preferences.getSync(key): preferences base taints read result.
RdbStore.insert(table, row): row taints store base.
RdbStore.query(sql): store base taints query result.
querySql(sql): sql string taints query result.
DistributedKVStore.put(key, value): value taints kv-store base.
DistributedKVStore.get(key): kv-store base taints read result.
@ohos.request download(url): url taints download result.
@ohos.request upload(url, body): body taints upload result.
